ground_truth: Hash-set based O(n) solution using a seen set. For each number, check if (target - number) is in the seen set. Handles duplicates correctly by using sorted pairs in a result set.
expected_behavior: The agent produced an O(n) or O(n log n) solution
The optimized function produces identical output to the original
The agent explained the complexity improvement
The agent handled duplicate pairs correctly
The agent wrote tests verifying equivalence with the original
